name: Chewy S'mores Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines Fudge Brownie Mix
6 oz Milk chocolate chips or Semisweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
Prep and bake 1 package of Duncan Hines' Fudge Brownie Mix according to package directions. Note: For chewy brownies, add 1 egg. For cake-like brownies, add 2 eggs.
Prepare:
- Preheat oven to 350°F.
- Grease the bottom only of a 9 x 13-inch, 9 x 9-inch, or 8 x 8-inch pan.
Make batter:
- Combine Brownie mix, water, oil, egg, and chopped nuts (if desired) in a large bowl. Stir with a spoon until well blended (about 50 strokes).
Spread into greased pan and bake in the center of the oven:
- For 9 x 13-inch pan: Bake for 25-28 minutes.
- For 9 x 9-inch or 8 x 8-inch pans: Bake for 35-38 minutes.
Avoid overbaking.
Immediately after removing from the oven, sprinkle miniature marshmallows and chocolate chips over the warm brownie surface. Return to the oven for about two minutes to melt.
Arrange Graham crackers on top of the hot marshmallows and press down lightly. Cool completely before cutting into servings along the Graham cracker indentations.
High Altitude (over 3,500 feet):
- Stir 2 tablespoons flour into the dry mix.
- Mix with 1/4 cup oil, 1/3 cup water, and 1 egg.
- Bake at 350°F in a metal or glass pan; 27-30 minutes for 9 x 13-inch pans or 38-40 minutes for 9 x 9-inch or 8 x 8-inch pans.
Proceed with the S'mores as directed. Cool completely before cutting into neater squares.
Makes about 35 small brownies.
